summary:
Lead architect on a **$30M+ portfolio** of enterprise consulting engagements across healthcare, life sciences, financial services, HR technology, and media. Promoted to Principal (L7) in Q1 2022; rated Top Tier.

**Signature engagements** included: a **$1.5M GenAI reporting portal** with chat-based NLP authoring released to ~300 enterprise customers; an **agentic AI engagement** for a top-10 global biopharma using Bedrock AgentCore with GxP compliance (ICH E6, 21 CFR); a **$6.3M greenfield serverless + ML platform** for a global pharmaceutical company where downstream impact grew from $313K/mo to $9.2M/mo; a **$2.8M genomics pipeline** that scaled to 1,000+ concurrent samples, reduced runtime from 20 to 9 hours, and cut per-sample cost from $33 to $6.72; an **ML-powered inspection platform** for a Fortune 50 manufacturer that reduced defect rejection by 80%; and a **10PB cross-account migration** for a Fortune 100 media company's AI workloads.

Deployed consultants as an away team to an AWS service team to co-develop a product feature, directly shaping the service roadmap. Created a cross-practice training program for ML/Data Engineers transitioning to GenAI development. Submitted 7 Product Feature Requests driving customer insights into platform roadmaps.

Mentored **24+ engineers** across career development and promotion readiness. Conducted **200+ technical interviews**. SDE-certified interviewer and BRIT graduate. Founded the NAMER SDT Apps Principals community.

**President of AWS People with Disabilities at Global Services (PWD@GS)**, scaling from a Denver chapter to a global organization across NAMER, EMEA, APJ, and GCR. Led multi-year effort to make AWS certification exams screenreader-accessible. Presented at Amazon GAAM 2020 to 1,400+ attendees. AWS Tier 2 Speaker certified.

Provided white-glove architectural guidance and risk management for complex multi-region enterprise environments, bridging deep technical analysis with executive-level communication. Led operational reviews and performance tuning across S3, EC2, CloudFront, and networking stacks, reducing incident frequency and improving cost efficiency.

Known internally as **"The Container Guy."** Go-to architect for containerization strategy across hybrid cloud environments. Designed containerized platforms using Kubernetes, Rancher, and AWS/GCP hybrid strategies for enterprise clients. Led **$1M+ cloud migration programs**. Created multi-cloud networking topologies and fault-tolerant infrastructure for CI/CD and DevSecOps pipelines. Delivered executive briefings on cloud-native architecture, platform resiliency, and observability to C-suite stakeholders.
Architected and delivered custom SaaS platforms with six-figure budgets, owning full lifecycle from stakeholder alignment through production deployment with multi-region HA.
Built middleware for cable set-top-box interfaces; led a team of 10 front-end developers shipping customer-facing features on proprietary JavaScript frameworks.
Built web experiences for Kraft and American Express.
Founded and ran a web development consultancy for small and medium-sized businesses.
